title: Recoverable commanded quadruped mobility from simulation to governed hardware
proposition: Develop a compact four-legged robot that can recover autonomously from bounded resting falls, follow planar velocity and yaw commands, survive bounded disturbances, and carry reproducible evidence from MuJoCo through shadow hardware commissioning.

conditions: front, back, and side resting falls on level floor
continuous walk-impact-recover-resume missions on level floor

morphology.notes: Free-base quadruped with three actuated joints per leg in the current development Assembly.

northStar.statement: Complete one continuous commanded mission through approach, bounded impact, autonomous recovery, and resumed locomotion without a simulation reset.

capabilityStages.name: Command-conditioned locomotion
capabilityStages.question: Can the robot execute stop, forward, reverse, lateral, yaw, delay, and disturbance commands without gate violations?
exitCriteria: All gating cases in the locked command-tracking Benchmark pass.
Every accepted Controller remains compatible with the declared Assembly interface.

capabilityStages.name: Autonomous self-righting
capabilityStages.question: Can the complete robot recover from front, back, left-side, and right-side resting poses into a stable stand without unsafe contacts, joint-limit use, or excess actuator authority?
exitCriteria: All four locked resting-pose cases reach and hold the shared stable-standing target.
One deployed Controller autonomously hands authority from recovery back to locomotion and satisfies the locked post-recovery command.
Recovery respects joint-limit, collision, actuator, mass, cost, and Action-width gates.
The selected morphology retains required locked locomotion regressions.

capabilityStages.name: Continuous disturbance resilience
capabilityStages.question: Can the robot walk into a bounded impact, recover from the resulting dynamic state, and resume the same command without resetting controller or plant state?
exitCriteria: Both locked continuous missions reach the stable recovery target after a real target loss.
The robot produces positive signed progress after the fixed recovery budget.
Atomic self-righting, handoff, command, and transition regressions remain passing.
A frozen learned Policy is promoted only if locked mission gates improve without regression.

capabilityStages.name: Transitions, braking, and visible motion quality
capabilityStages.question: Can the robot redirect and stop cleanly without trading away yaw settling or foot-contact quality?
exitCriteria: All gating transition cases pass without regression against command-tracking.
A human-reviewed witness shows accepted motion without unresolved severe visual hypotheses.

capabilityStages.name: Robustness and sim-to-real evidence
capabilityStages.question: Does the selected robot remain feasible across held-out plant variation and governed shadow commissioning?
exitCriteria: All gating held-out plant cases pass with immutable Policy and calibration provenance.
Shadow hardware capture preserves safety, state ABI, and Judge identities.

nonGoals: Treating an articulated waist as required before rigid-torso recovery is measured
Treating aggregate reward as a substitute for capability gates
Granting hardware actuation authority from simulation evidence alone
